docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCRAY,EDWIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVER, BRYAN K. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $102.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,102.00, DEFENDANT DOES NOT DISPUTE MONEY OWED TO PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO OLIVER, BRYAN K.
OEX WAS DISCHARGED, BUT HAS TO BE CHANGED TO OFF CALENDAR TO ENABLE US TO SCHEDULE A NEW OEX W/IN LESS THAN 120 DAYS PER NEW GUIDELINE.
